variant: give me the key stats on tretinoin results — numbers, not paragraphs

request.message: give me the key stats on tretinoin results — numbers, not paragraphs

response_body.response: the docs don't have long-term percentage improvements (like "x% collagen increase by week 12") or clinical trial data. what you've got is the protocol dosing and the phase window. tretinoin drives collagen production and cell turnover, but the exact magnitude isn't quantified in your current module.

products.name: Differin Adapalene Gel 0.1%
products.description: OTC retinoid (adapalene 0.1%) — first-line for comedonal acne.

cards.label: dermastamping frequency
cards.hint: 0.25mm depth, never same night as retinoid
